mapper.select:
select count(*) from tour_item_tbl
tour_item_status = 0 and end_period >= trunc(sysdate)
tour_item_status = 1
and end_period < trunc(sysdate)
and tour_item_name like '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'

select tour_item_no, tour_item_name, tour_item_adult_price, to_char(start_period, 'yyyy-MM-dd') as start_period, to_char(end_period, 'yyyy-MM-dd') as end_period, tour_item_days, tour_item_status,
(select tour_item_img_path from tour_item_img_tbl where tour_item_no = item_tbl.tour_item_no and tour_item_img_order = ( select min(tour_item_img_order) from tour_item_img_tbl where tour_item_no = item_tbl.tour_item_no ) ) as tour_item_img_path from tour_item_tbl item_tbl
tour_item_status = 0 and end_period >= trunc(sysdate)
tour_item_status = 1
and end_period < trunc(sysdate)
and tour_item_name like '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
order by item_tbl.tour_item_no desc
order by item_tbl.tour_item_no asc
mapper.update: update tour_item_tbl set tour_item_name = #{tourItemName}, tour_item_adult_price = #{tourItemAdultPrice}, tour_item_kid_price = #{tourItemKidPrice}, start_period = #{startPeriod}, end_period = #{endPeriod}, tour_item_days = #{tourItemDays} where tour_item_no = #{tourItemNo}
update tour_item_tbl set tour_item_status = 1 where end_period < trunc(sysdate) and tour_item_status = 0
